title: 10 best herbal teas for nipple pain during breastfeeding
description: Lemon balm teas helps with nipple pain during breastfeeding because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The tea's active compounds, such as rosmarinic acid, work to soothe and calm irritated tissues, reducing swelling and discomfort. Additionally, lemon balm has a gentle relaxing effect that can help ease tension in the chest area, making it an effective remedy for nipple soreness caused by breastfeeding.
